perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic overlay on a POV shot of a shopping cart being pushed through a Costco warehouse parking lot and entrance. (2) A rapid series of cuts follows, showcasing various products on warehouse shelves: Häagen-Dazs ice cream, Lenor scent beads, MamyPoko diapers, seaweed snacks, mini potato chips, spicy crackers, thick-cut pork belly, corn soup, bread crackers, coffee, jelly, Twix, chocolate balls, sparkling water, green tea, Kinder chocolate, quinoa crackers, cheese rolls, spicy tripe, rice, cheese cubes, sandwiches, microwavable rice, tuna mayo rolls, sour and spicy soup, guava green tea, green curry, etc. Hands are seen reaching for or pointing at items. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of items, ending with stacks of Jack Daniel's whiskey boxes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music begins immediately alongside an energetic male narrator's voice. (2) The narrator continuously speaks at a high speed, announcing product names and price reductions in sync with the visual cuts. Occasional 'ding' or 'ping' sound effects emphasize the price drops. (3) The music and narration maintain high energy and volume until the video ends abruptly after the last product description.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '好市多 每週特價速報 11/03-11/09' (Costco Weekly Special Report) and '黑五前哨站' (Black Friday Pre-station). (2) Functional text appears for every product: Brand and product name (e.g., '哈根達斯 抹茶莓果雪酥'), '原價' (Original Price), discount amount (e.g., '-200'), and '特價' (Special Price). (3) Decorative text includes variety-style fonts and colors to highlight the deals.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One person is pushing the cart and pointing at items, inferred as male from hands and vocal characteristics.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The creator is behind the camera, only hands and occasionally a beige sleeve are visible.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and bulk product packaging.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a rapid-fire shopping guide for Costco Taiwan members, highlighting specific discounts and promotional items available between November 3rd and November 9th to drive warehouse traffic.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The content is dedicated entirely to showcasing products and prices at a specific retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed price narration and POV warehouse walk-through.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-intensity editing style common in short-form e-commerce promotions to capture attention and convey a sense of urgency regarding limited-time deals.
